indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other work materials.

indicators.name: Seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement allows for comfortable sitting while working.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: The presence of natural light may cause glare on the computer screen.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for solo computer work due to the large desk and comfortable seating, but natural light could potentially cause glare.
